title: Thai Tom Kha Soup
description: A spicy and sour Thai soup made with coconut milk, lemongrass, and your choice of protein. Serve with steamed rice or noodles for a delicious and filling meal.
instructions: Heat 2 tablespoons of oil in a large pot over medium-high heat.
Add the chicken and cook until browned, about 5 minutes.
Add the tom kha paste and cook for 1 minute, until fragrant.
Pour in the coconut milk and chicken broth, and bring to a boil.
Reduce the heat to medium-low and simmer for 10 minutes.
Add the lemongrass, fish sauce, and sugar, and stir to combine.
Taste and adjust the seasoning as needed.
Serve the soup hot, garnished with lime wedges and sliced chili peppers.
